title: Parties discovered overlay (auto-extended)
description: Auto-extended overlay companion to parties-master.json. The pipeline appends an entry here whenever it encounters a party label in upstream election results that is not present in the master registry. Entries here are intentionally low-trust ('recognition: unknown') and serve two purposes: (1) keep the pipeline non-blocking on first sighting of a new/regional/unrecognised party, (2) provide a triage queue — operators promote entries from here to the master after verifying full_name + ECI recognition status. Once promoted, the entry is removed from this file in the same commit.

x-changelog.description: Initial schema. Same shape as parties-master but recognition is fixed to 'unknown' and per-entry sources are required (so the operator can see which result page first surfaced the party).

sources.description: File-level provenance per CLAUDE.md §12. May be empty when the file has just been initialised; per-entry sources carry the actual lineage.

eci_code.description: ECI numeric code if the upstream provided one alongside the unrecognised label; null otherwise.

recognition.description: Fixed. Anything else belongs in parties-master.json.

sources.description: Per-entry provenance: the upstream URL that first surfaced this party label.
